epicTitle: Stack-Agnostic Access Control for Blueprint Diagnostics

bodySections.intent: Introduce stack-agnostic access control types and derive route matrix from findings instead of a fixed RLS column.
bodySections.userJourney: Blueprint scan produces accessControlFindings and accessControlMatrix alongside legacy securityMatrix; no UI break yet.
bodySections.problem: RLS is treated as universal; MariaDB/MongoDB/app-layer scoping cannot be expressed.
bodySections.solution: Add shared/access-control.types.ts, shared/access-control-matrix.ts, optional BlueprintDocument fields, unit tests. Export from shared/blueprint.ts and src/lib/visudev/access-control-types.ts.
bodySections.edgeCases: Empty findings → unverified cells. MariaDB project → no false RLS critical from types alone.
acceptance: AccessControlFinding and AccessControlMatrixRow types exist in shared/
deriveAccessControlMatrixFromFindings() covered by unit tests
BlueprintData accepts optional accessControlFindings/accessControlMatrix
npm run checks green

bodySections.intent: Trace auth/authz/validation/tenant/ownership along the full request path from SoftwareGraph edges and facts.
bodySections.userJourney: After scan, tenant-isolation shows protected when TenantGuard + repository WHERE tenant_id is evidenced; critical when direct DB access bypasses scope.
bodySections.problem: Current inference only regex-matches auth/validation in directory; no chain completeness check.
bodySections.solution: local-engine/src/services/access-control/app-chain-analyzer.service.ts walks route→auth→service→repository→query nodes; emits AccessControlFinding[] with enforcementLayers and evidence.
bodySections.edgeCases: Incomplete graph → unverified not missing. List endpoints → ownership n/a.
acceptance: Analyzer emits findings for auth, authorization, validation, tenant-isolation, ownership
Bypass pattern (direct collection/table access without scope) → partial or missing + warning
Wired into blueprint-enrichment.service.ts
Unit tests with fixture graph snippets

issues.title: Database security adapter registry + unknown fallback

bodySections.intent: Select technology-specific security adapters by detected DB dialect; honest unsupported for native features on unknown DBs.
bodySections.userJourney: Project with SQLite gets app-layer findings only; PostgreSQL project additionally gets DB policy findings.
bodySections.problem: No adapter boundary; all DBs implicitly judged by RLS.
bodySections.solution: DatabaseSecurityAdapter interface, registry in access-control/index.ts, unknown.adapter.ts (app facts only). Reuse resolve-database-config dialect hint.
bodySections.edgeCases: No DATABASE_URL → unknown adapter, app-chain only.
acceptance: Registry resolves adapter by DatabaseSecurityDialect
Unknown adapter never emits false RLS-missing criticals
Unit tests for registry selection

issues.title: PostgreSQL / Supabase security adapter
dependsOn: Database security adapter registry + unknown fallback

bodySections.intent: Detect ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY, CREATE POLICY, grants, roles from SQL migrations and code facts.
bodySections.userJourney: Inspector shows Tenant Isolation: Protected — Mechanism: PostgreSQL RLS — Evidence: CREATE POLICY tenant_employees.
bodySections.problem: rls-policy concept is route-scoped only; no migration/SQL file analysis.
bodySections.solution: postgres.adapter.ts parses fact snippets and .sql files for RLS/grants; maps to database-row-policy, database-grant mechanisms; tenant-isolation/resource-scope findings.
bodySections.edgeCases: RLS enabled but no policies → partial. Supabase extends postgres adapter.
acceptance: Detects CREATE POLICY and ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY in fixtures
Findings include mechanism label PostgreSQL RLS
Does not require live DB connection

issues.title: Replace db.rls-missing policy with abstract tenant-isolation rule
dependsOn: Database security adapter registry + unknown fallback

bodySections.intent: Expectation engine checks abstract controls, not RLS presence.
bodySections.userJourney: MariaDB project with repository tenant filter shows OK; missing filter on sensitive table shows critical tenant-isolation finding.
bodySections.problem: db.rls-missing and rls-policy concept treat RLS as universal requirement.
bodySections.solution: Add access-control.tenant-isolation-missing rule using AccessControlFinding status; deprecate db.rls-missing; map legacy findings in normalizeBlueprintData.
bodySections.edgeCases: Non-multi-tenant app → tenant-isolation not-applicable via project profile.
acceptance: No new findings with ruleId db.rls-missing
Sensitive tenant data without scope → access-control.tenant-isolation-missing
MariaDB + repo filter fixture → protected, not critical

issues.title: Diagnostics UI — abstract Security Matrix columns

bodySections.intent: Replace RLS column with Scope, Tenant, Ownership; show status symbols from AccessControlStatus.
bodySections.userJourney: Diagnostics matrix columns: Route, AuthN, AuthZ, Scope, Tenant, Ownership, Validation, Rate Limit, Audit, Status.
bodySections.problem: SecurityMatrix.tsx still renders fixed RLS column.
bodySections.solution: AccessControlMatrix component (or extend SecurityMatrix behind VITE_ACCESS_CONTROL_V2). Use accessControlStatusSymbol(). Legacy matrix when flag off.
bodySections.edgeCases: Old blueprint.json without new fields → fall back to legacy matrix.
acceptance: RLS column removed when VITE_ACCESS_CONTROL_V2=true
Cells use protected/partial/missing/unverified/n/a/unsupported symbols
Playwright smoke updated for new columns

issues.title: Access Control Inspector — mechanisms and evidence
dependsOn: Diagnostics UI — abstract Security Matrix columns

bodySections.intent: Inspector shows concrete mechanisms (PostgreSQL RLS, Repository Filter, MongoDB Collection Role) when user opens a matrix cell or finding.
bodySections.userJourney: Click Tenant cell → Inspector: Status Protected, Mechanisms list, Enforcement layers, Evidence snippets, optional warning for bypass path.
bodySections.problem: ProblemInspector is finding-centric only; no mechanism/enforcement display.
bodySections.solution: AccessControlInspector.tsx in diagnostics/; bind to selected matrix cell control + route findings.
bodySections.edgeCases: unsupported mechanism shows ⊘ with explanation, not error styling.
acceptance: Inspector lists mechanisms with technology labels
Shows enforcementLayers and evidence excerpts
Warning block when finding.warning set

issues.title: MariaDB / MySQL security adapter
dependsOn: Database security adapter registry + unknown fallback

bodySections.intent: Detect grants, SQL SECURITY views, stored procedures, repository tenant_id filters for MariaDB/MySQL projects.
bodySections.userJourney: MariaDB tenant isolation via view + repo filter shows Protected with dual mechanisms; no RLS false positive.
bodySections.problem: MariaDB has no native RLS; current model cannot represent view-based isolation.
bodySections.solution: mariadb.adapter.ts detects GRANT, CREATE VIEW ... SQL SECURITY, WHERE tenant_id in repo facts.
bodySections.edgeCases: Direct table grants to app user without view → partial/missing.
acceptance: Fixture with security view + repo filter → tenant-isolation protected
Mechanism labels include SQL SECURITY View and Repository Query Filter
RLS never required for pass

issues.title: MongoDB security adapter
dependsOn: Database security adapter registry + unknown fallback

bodySections.intent: Detect collection roles, tenantId/ownerId query filters, middleware; schema validation maps to validation control only.
bodySections.userJourney: MongoDB route with find({ tenantId }) + requireTenantContext shows protected; find({}) bypass shows partial + warning.
bodySections.problem: No MongoDB-specific detection; RLS column meaningless.
bodySections.solution: mongodb.adapter.ts from facts: collection permissions strings, query filter patterns, middleware names.
bodySections.edgeCases: Schema validation alone does not satisfy tenant-isolation.
acceptance: tenantId filter in query → tenant-isolation protected
Unscoped find → partial with warning
Schema validator → validation finding only

issues.title: Legacy securityMatrix deprecation + docs
dependsOn: Diagnostics UI — abstract Security Matrix columns
Replace db.rls-missing policy with abstract tenant-isolation rule

bodySections.intent: Retire RLS column and rls-policy concept; document stack-agnostic security model.
bodySections.userJourney: Docs explain abstract controls vs technology mechanisms; old API consumers still get synthesized legacy matrix one release.
bodySections.problem: Dual models confuse contributors; docs still list RLS as universal Blueprint column.
bodySections.solution: Update docs/visudev-blueprint-engine.md, normalizeBlueprintData synthesizes legacy from accessControlMatrix; mark securityMatrix @deprecated; remove rls from default UI.
bodySections.edgeCases: E2E mocks with rls field still parse via normalization.
acceptance: docs/visudev-blueprint-engine.md describes abstract controls
RLS removed from SecurityMatrix default export path
normalizeBlueprintData maps new matrix → legacy for compat tests
npm run checks green
